observations.description: The video shows a classroom with two teachers and several children. There is a white paper on the floor in the middle of the room. A teacher is walking towards the children, who are gathered at a table with art supplies.
More children enter the room and join the group at the table. The table has several containers with different colored paints and brushes.
A child in a red dress walks towards the white paper on the floor. Another child is standing near the art supplies table.
The child in the red dress is now standing on the white paper. Another child is walking towards the paper.
A teacher kneels down next to the child in the red dress, who is still on the white paper. The teacher is holding the child's hands.
The teacher continues to interact with the child in the red dress. Other children are still at the art supplies table.
The teacher stands up and walks away from the child in the red dress. Another child in a light-colored dress walks towards the white paper.
The child in the red dress is now at the art supplies table, and another child in a light-colored dress is walking towards the white paper. A teacher is also at the art supplies table.
Several children are now at the art supplies table, and a teacher is helping them. The child in the light-colored dress is standing on the white paper.
A teacher in a red shirt is helping children at the art supplies table. The child in the light-colored dress is still on the white paper. Another teacher walks towards the art supplies table.

The teacher in the red shirt is still helping children at the table. The child in the light-colored dress walks off the white paper. Another child in a white shirt walks towards the paper and kneels down.
The child in the white shirt is kneeling on the white paper. The teacher in the red shirt is still at the art supplies table. Another child in a red dress is walking towards the paper.
The child in the red dress is now on the white paper. The child in the white shirt is still kneeling. A teacher is walking towards the paper.
